data.body: Corrected remediation epic 6f2d per user: (1) intent-source-fidelity criterion + WS-INTENT-ALIGN — FIRES ONLY when the ticket is linked to a session log (no linked intent source -> not-applicable; never fabricate a baseline) AND MUST run on a frontier model (Opus) for the large session-log context (AGENT-tier, trigger-gated, not single-turn). (2) Fixed the prompt-storage framing: criteria_v*.json under docs/experiments are TRANSIENT EXPERIMENT REFERENCES, NOT permanent prompt storage and NOT the deliverable — no migration; WS-PROMPTS reframed to 'the gate's PRODUCTION prompts (built during 5fd2) live on the engine; experiments stay labeled as experiments'. Added an 'Experiment-artifact hygiene' concern: nothing under docs/experiments (criteria_v*.json, harnesses, runs) is durable; durable = src/rebar + engine prompt library + docs/. Epic still passes check-ac(9)+clarity(7).
